title: Respect Reduce Motion and add spinner/progress fallbacks in CLI + GUI
source: macOS HIG (Motion & Accessibility) — Reduce Motion; NO_COLOR and non-interactive terminal detection conventions
description: Animated spinners and progress bars are good ambient feedback but break in non-TTY contexts (CI logs, piped output) and should be disabled when a user has Reduce Motion enabled or is on a dumb terminal. The GUI should likewise degrade animated transitions to instant when Reduce Motion is on. This improves accessibility and prevents garbled control characters in captured logs.
proposed_changes: In progress.py, gate animated spinners behind `sys.stdout.isatty()` and honor NO_COLOR/CI env vars — fall back to plain line-per-update output otherwise. In SwiftUI, read `@Environment(\.accessibilityReduceMotion)` and swap `.animation(.spring, value:)` for `.animation(nil)` / instant state changes when true; keep withAnimation transitions only when motion is allowed.
